risks.failureMode: Strategic output treated as binding authority
risks.control: Current official sources, exact facts, professional receipt, expiry, transaction gate
Business purpose, people/risk map, entity-cost penalty, local substance

risks.failureMode: One attractive structure anchors the model
risks.control: Diverse frontier, independent red team, counterfactuals, stop conditions

risks.failureMode: Headline tax or grant size becomes the objective
risks.control: Full VLV denominator and independent reality anchors
Compensation disclosure, separated evaluation/referral, independent review
No-secrets gate, protected deployment, minimization, deletion

risks.failureMode: One successful case becomes universal memory
risks.control: Narrow scope, versioning, known failures, expiry, revocation, fresh transfer

risks.failureMode: Assets funded before demand and permits
risks.control: Customer commitments, project SPV, milestone finance, stop/unwind gates

risks.failureMode: Every exception returns to one person
risks.control: Fixed products, clause matrices, delegated authority, decline/escalation paths
